rural_min_site_area: 2000 m² (single house on individual on-site wastewater treatment)
rural_site_scaling: +10 m² per 1 m² of house area above 200 m²
ribbon_development_rule: five or more houses on one side of any 250 m of road frontage (linear development)
sightline_x_m: 2.4 m (reduced to 2.0 m in difficult urban circumstances)
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice for Wastewater Treatment and Disposal Systems serving single houses
residential_density_dph: 35 dph standard (Core Strategy); 35-50 town centre/transit; 15-35 low-medium; 5-12 low
site_coverage_pct: 75% single-storey/6m; 60% two-storey/9m; 50% three-storey/12m (commercial); industrial not exceed 75%
separation_distance_m: 22 m back-to-back between dwellings / opposing first-floor windows; increased for over two storeys
car_parking_dwelling: 1.5 spaces per dwelling (1-3 bed); 2 spaces per unit (4+ bed)
building_height: landmark buildings of significant height may be appropriate in certain urban locations (per 2018 Height Guidelines)
trigger_AA: AA Screening / NIS — screened on all; any app affecting a Natura 2000 site
trigger_EIA: EIA / EIAR for projects over EIA Directive thresholds (Sch.5 Pt 1/2)
trigger_FRA: FRA + DM Justification Test where use inappropriate to its Flood Zone (A/B)
trigger_AHIA: Architectural Heritage Assessment Report for works to a Protected Structure
trigger_EcIA: Ecological Impact Assessment for all proposals within or near an SPA/SAC/NHA
trigger_VIA: Visual Impact Assessment in sensitive landscape locations (Class 3/4)
trigger_TTA: TTA / Traffic Impact for significant development proposals
notes: DRAFT plan text — version-track vs adopted plan + Variation No.1. Side boundary min 2 m. Granny flat max 50 sqm GFA. Industrial noise <=55 dB(A) Leq at boundary. Public open space qualitative (no fixed %). Linear rule waived for sole family-owned site.
